t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key. 0=Not available (fallback/placeholder for users whose country cannot be determined), 1-250=countries ordered roughly alphabetically by ISO code. Referenced by Dim_Customer, Fact_BillingDeposit, Dim_CountryBin, V_Dim_Customer.

issues.problem: Tier 1 paraphrase: dropped 'Referenced by Dim_Customer, Fact_BillingDeposit, Dim_CountryBin, V_Dim_Customer' from Dim_Country wiki and substituted EXW-specific context. Tier 1 requires verbatim upstream text.

Dictionary columns with <=15 distinct values should list inline key=value pairs in the Elements table. AllowedUserTagType has 5 known values, PaymentAllowed has 2 (0/1), AllowedUserSelectedValue has 2 (true/false). Values are described in prose but not enumerated inline per spec.

No explicit Phase Gate Checklist with P2/P3 checkmarks. Footer says 'Phases: 13/14' but does not show which phases were completed vs. skipped, making it impossible to verify data evidence methodology.

Bundle resolver failed to include DWH_dbo.Dim_Country and DWH_dbo.Dim_State_and_Province wikis (both exist locally). Writer correctly found them independently. Bundle resolver should be fixed for future runs.
Minor Tier 1 fidelity deviation: appended 'Passthrough from Dim_Country (Name → Country rename)' to the upstream-verbatim text. Core meaning preserved but strictly not verbatim.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Replace CountryID description with verbatim Dim_Country wiki text, then append local context AFTER the upstream quote. (2) Add inline key=value pairs for AllowedUserTagType, PaymentAllowed, and AllowedUserSelectedValue in the Elements table. (3) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist showing P2/P3 completion status.

table_level_stats_in_descriptions: Section 1: 52,548 rows, 250 countries, 174 cryptos, 53 US regions, 9,222 US rows, single UpdateDate 2026-04-15, all PaymentAllowed=0
skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist not explicitly shown; footer claims 13/14 phases
